title: X402PolicyConfig
description: Declarative spending policy for presidio-hardened-x402. Defines per-call, aggregate, per-endpoint, and multi-party authorization limits for autonomous agent x402 payments. IETF draft candidate.

max_per_call_usd.description: Block any single payment exceeding this USD amount.

daily_limit_usd.description: Block a payment that would push aggregate spend over this USD amount within the time window.

per_endpoint.description: Per-endpoint-prefix aggregate limits. Keys are URL prefixes; values are USD limits.

window_seconds.description: Time window in seconds for aggregate limits (default: 86400 = 24 hours).

agent_id.description: Optional agent identifier embedded in audit log events.

mpa.description: Multi-party authorization (MPA) configuration. When set, payments exceeding min_amount_usd require n-of-m approvals before execution.

threshold.description: Number of approvals required (n in n-of-m). Must be <= number of configured approvers.

min_amount_usd.description: Minimum payment amount in USD that triggers MPA. Payments below this are exempt.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for webhook approvals.

approvers.description: List of configured approvers (m in n-of-m).

mode.description: 'webhook': HTTP POST approval request. 'crypto': HMAC-SHA256 countersignature verification.
